type.description: The id or class name of the procedure type. Either 'Procedure' or a derived type identifier

initial_states.description: list of function initial state values

oneOf.description: List of boundary conditions. Each item has a name <string> and a node_variable <NodeVariableIdTuple>
Path to CSV file. First column must be the datetime index. Headers (first row) must indicate boundary names
list of procedure outputs. Each item has a name <string> and a node_variable tuple <NodeVariableIdTuple>
Path to CSV file. First column must be the datetime index. Headers (first row) must indicate output names

save_results.description: File path where to save the results of the procedure

save_dict.description: File path where to save the results of the procedure as dict

overwrite.description: Choice to overwrite observations at the node-variable with the procedure output

overwrite_original.description: Choice to overwrite original observations at the node-variable with the procedure output

bias_correction.description: Perform bias correction. Adjustment is performed after statistics computation

adjust.description: Adjust output series using observations. Adjustment is performed after statistics computation

warmup_steps.description: For output adjustment, discard this number of initial rows

tail_steps.description: For output adjustment, use only this number of final rows

error_band.description: If ajusting output, add error band series

read_sim.description: Instead of reading .data of input node variables, read .series_sim[0].data . Defaults to self.read_sim

sim_index.description: read this series_sim index of boundary node variables (with read_sim)
